title: Climbing
overview: Se-hyun, who had a car accident three months ago, is preparing for the World Climbing Competition. She suffers from nightmares due to her unrecoverable condition and pressure on competition. Then one night, a phone call is made to Sehyun's cell phone, which was broken at the time of the accident.
